sub_mechanisms: M_1: identify a finite-group symmetry action on the pretrained-weight tensor
M_2: represent the LoRA delta as a 2-cocycle for this action
M_3: compute the 2-periodic invariant class via norm-map computation
M_4: constrain updates to preserve the invariant class
stripped_llm_application: Identify a finite-group symmetry of the pretrained weights; represent the parameter-efficient update as a 2-cocycle on this symmetry; compute a 2-periodic invariant via norm-map; constrain training updates to preserve this invariant class.
novelty_claim_stripped: PiSSA/LoRA-GA use SVD-based linear init; HRP uses high-rank preheating; S'MoRE uses GNN structure on residuals; this candidate uses an ALGEBRAIC-TOPOLOGICAL invariant class as the conserved structure.
